markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and messaging for Webflow's developer-focused blog posts and integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Webflow positioning needs refinement in blog content; current messaging conflicts with brand positioning](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Blog content aims for top-of-funnel brand awareness and education for developers](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Integration pages target mid-funnel evaluation; require more specific, actionable guidance](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Content strategy to evolve with comprehensive tagging system for improved user journeys](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

## Topics

### Webflow Messaging and Positioning

  - [Current blog content inadvertently promotes competitors (e.g., headless CMS)](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Webflow positions itself as a "website experience platform" or "visual-first CMS"](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Need for clear documentation on Webflow's messaging to inform content creation](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Goal: Promote the "Webflow way" of website development, similar to HubSpot's inbound marketing approach](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Blog Content Strategy

  - [Target: Top-of-funnel awareness and education for developers](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Focus on in-depth technical education, not marketing](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Aim to become top search results for site creation and web development topics](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Create a "cult of Webflow" through comprehensive, interlinked content](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Integration Pages

  - [Separate strategy from blog content](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Target: Mid-funnel evaluation for potential buyers](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Need more specific, actionable guidance in "Get Started" sections](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [FAQs should provide clear, definitive answers or link to official documentation](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)

### Content Journey and CTAs

  - [Develop a matrix of interrelated tags for better content clustering](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [CTAs should focus on continued learning rather than immediate conversion](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Consider creating core "Webflow way" pages for key topics](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Map out user journeys for different personas to inform CTA placement](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)

### Content Improvements

  - [Align on where developer-focused content will live (pending internal discussion)](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Provide more detailed, step-by-step guidance in integration tutorials](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Refine "Why use \[Tool\]" sections to focus on Webflow's capabilities in that use case](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [Make FAQs more direct and relevant to Webflow integration specifics](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Michael to provide Webflow messaging documentation and sales collateral](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [GrowthX to revise blog posts based on new messaging guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Team to refine integration page content, especially "Get Started" and FAQ sections](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Develop a more comprehensive tagging strategy for content clustering](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Colin and Luke to review and provide feedback on integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Team to reconsider the approach for "Why use \[Tool\]" sections in integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/MRZdj97PyvmxHa4zZx5uMvviCSpJSCqr?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
